feature_name: Examples for Writing to a File
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (column1 UInt32, column2 UInt32, column3 UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO TABLE FUNCTION file('test_data.tsv', 'TSV', 'column1 UInt32, column2 UInt32, column3 UInt32') VALUES (1, 2, 3), (4, 5, 6);
INSERT INTO TABLE FUNCTION file('partitioned_test_{_partition_id}.tsv', 'TSV', 'column1 UInt32, column2 UInt32, column3 UInt32') PARTITION BY column3 VALUES (1, 2, 3), (4, 5, 3), (7, 8, 6);
SELECT * FROM file('test_data.tsv', 'TSV', 'column1 UInt32, column2 UInt32, column3 UInt32');
SELECT * FROM file('partitioned_test_{_partition_id}.tsv', 'TSV', 'column1 UInt32, column2 UInt32, column3 UInt32') WHERE column3 = 3;
